page_metadata.biotools__summary: dbPSP (database of Phosphorylation Sites in Prokaryotes) is an updated resource for annotating protein phosphorylation sites (p-sites) in prokaryotes (bacteria and archaea).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: dbPSP (database of Phosphorylation Sites in Prokaryotes) is an updated resource for annotating protein phosphorylation sites (p-sites) in prokaryotes (bacteria and archaea).
